examples: I felt so awkward at the party.
It was awkward meeting my ex at the store.
Be consistent with your study habits.
Her performance has been very consistent.
context: I'm taking long strides and trying to run at a consistent pace.

examples: I like my bacon extra crispy.
These fries are nice and crispy.
context: It does look so good, it's really crispy.

examples: Add some seasoning to the soup.
The seasoning on this steak is perfect.
Korean cooking uses a lot of different seasonings.
context: I also add everything but the bagel seasoning to almost everything I eat.

examples: I was sweaty after the workout.
His sweaty hands made it hard to grip the rope.
It's normal to feel sweaty in a sauna.
This place has a great vibe.
I'm getting good vibes from this restaurant.
The vibe at the concert was electric.
context: It has a very laid back vibe.
I like this vibe, but first stop is the convenience store.
